title: oxylobium heterophyllum
intro: Oxylobium heterophyllum, also known as the hairy-leaved oxylobium, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Oxylobium heterophyllum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and may also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
